introduction.content: Get complete real-time visibility into your grid, connected energy consumer, suppliers, and occurring grid congestions. Get the insights you need to manage your grid more efficiently and be prepared for the changing grid requirements.

case.content: With advanced ML algorithms, FION identifies unusual patterns in energy consumption and alerts in case of potential issues such as faulty equipment, tampering, or fraud. FIONs user-friendly platform is easy to integrate with existing systems and can help prevent costly errors, improve efficiency, and increase customer satisfaction.

FIONs AI leverages smart meter data and GIS data to calculate accurate grid loads in real-time, wherever you want, without installation of additional IoT devices. With FION, you can start leveraging load flexibilization and prevent bottlenecks and damages in your low-voltage grid.

FION offers a powerful solution for modern DSOs looking to strategically expand their grid infrastructure. Using cutting-edge analytics and AI, FION can identify the areas with the highest need for infrastructure reinforcement and help DSOs make informed decisions about where to invest their resources.

benefit.content: Decrease investments in measuring infrastructure and save costs expanding your grid by smarter, real-time data based decision making.
Accelerate manual processes like grid compatibility tests and free up capacity of your workforce, especially important in times of worker shortage.
Make your grid security bulletproof detecting and flagging anomalies related to hacker or fraudulent activity immediately.

message.first_line: DIGITIZING THE DISTRIBUTION GRIDS OF TOMORROW

paragraph: At FION Energy we have one mission: to support DSOs in mastering the energy transition by applying our expertise - data science and software development - where it is most needed.
Bertty, Philipp and Johannes, the founders behind FION Energy, found themselves as a team driven by one goal: to accelerate the energy transition to live in a cleaner world.

After hundreds of hours talking to different stakeholders in the energy industry we identified one common bottleneck - the reaction time of DSOs when it comes to process connection requests or other customer requests.

So we talked to DSOs all over Europe and learned about the huge challenges the energy transition means for the distribution grids. With the transition from a centralized energy system to a decentralized one, the requirements to the low and mid voltage grids have changed drastically. The increasing number of distributed energy supply sources but also energy consumption points force DSOs to start monitoring and controlling the low voltage grids in real time. In order to do that, a huge amount of data coming from different meters across the grid, existing software and external data like weather forecasting needs to be processed in near real time.

FION Energy provides a solution to standardize all the data in one platform ensuring the highest standards of cyber security, GDPR compliance and regulatory requirements. Additionally, it assists DSOs with ML-based workflow automations to eliminate repetitive tasks and free up time for what really matters.
Feel free to reach out to us at any time and join us in building the distribution grids of the future.

contact.message: WE ARE WORKING HARD TO BRING THE NEWEST AI TECHNOLOGIES TO YOUR GRID. PLEASE CONTACT US TO GET MORE INFORMATION.

about_us.title: About Us
about_us.content: Helping DSOs build a more resilient, sustainable, and reliable electric grid for a greener tomorrow.
